title: Gerbong Sunyi dan Bisikan Hati
theme: Melalui perjalanan rutin di KRL, seorang profesional muda menemukan kembali makna hidup dan pentingnya kehadiran diri dalam momen-momen kecil yang selama ini diabaikan.

cover.prompt: An environmental shot from inside a modern commuter train. A gentle human silhouette is subtly visible, looking out of a slightly weathered window. The window reflects the warm, ambient interior lighting of the train. Outside, the vibrant urban landscape of a city in late afternoon transforms into a beautiful, soft blur of colors, with distant city lights beginning to emerge as a gentle sparkle. The focus is on the quiet atmosphere of the journey and the fleeting, abstract views of the urban environment.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Maya, a young professional weary of her monotonous KRL commute, begins to notice overlooked details, sparking introspection. A stunning sunset from a bridge ignites reflections on forgotten dreams, leading to a profound realization that meaning and beauty reside in small, present moments, transforming her routine journey into a vital adventure of self-discovery.
